_comment: Source-of-truth for normalising team names that appear in David's private Google Sheets (and any other external feed) to the canonical names used in the modern site data — i.e. the names in src/data/rankings-{men,women}.ts and src/data/all-teams-{men,women}-2026.ts. The team-page slug routing is built off those, so historical files must use the same names or the page lookups return zero rows. Keys are sheet-side variants, values are canonical site names. Read by scripts/build-regional-history.py at ingest time. Add new aliases here as variants surface; the Python script will print a WARN line for any sheet team name that doesn't resolve to a name already present in regionals-history.json.
